localeNotice.title: Your system language looks like {targetLanguage}
localeNotice.description: This page is currently in {currentLanguage}. Switch to {targetLanguage}?

index.line2: Full-stack developer {doubtful}, from Fuzhou, {age} y.o., INF/TJ.

project.line1: Hey Codex, help me write the content for this page.

siteLike.emptyDesc: Be the first to like this site.

githubLogin.emptyDesc: No one has signed in with GitHub yet.

message.title: Message Board
message.placeholder: I will be deleting any negative comments.
message.loginRequiredDesc: You need to sign in before posting, replying, or liking messages.
message.emptyDesc: You can be the first one to leave a message.

friendLinks.applyReminder: After submitting, please be sure to email me to remind me to approve at {mail}. This site has not integrated email notifications yet. If you don't remind me, I don't know whether someone submitted for approval. I am very friendly, so please rest assured. 🥹
friendLinks.loginRequiredDesc: You need to sign in before submitting a link exchange request.
friendLinks.adminRequiredDesc: Your current account cannot manage friend links.
friendLinks.pendingEmptyDesc: New requests will show up here and expire after 30 days if untouched.

errors.generic: The request did not complete. Please try again later.
errors.authRequired: This action requires a GitHub login.
errors.adminRequired: The current account is not an administrator.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session may have expired. Refresh or sign in again.
errors.siteAlreadyLiked: This browser has already liked the site.
errors.commentAlreadyLiked: You have already liked this message.
errors.commentEditForbidden: You can only edit your own message.
errors.commentDeleteForbidden: You can only delete your own message.
errors.commentNotFound: The message does not exist or has been removed.
errors.commentParentNotFound: The reply target does not exist.
errors.commentPinOnlyRoot: Only top-level messages can be pinned.
errors.friendLinkNotFound: The friend link does not exist or was removed.
errors.friendLinkApplicationPending: There is already a pending request for this site.
errors.friendLinkApplicationNotFound: The request does not exist or has already been handled.
errors.invalidGithubOauthState: GitHub login validation failed. Please start again.
errors.githubOauthNotConfigured: GitHub login is not configured correctly on this site. Please contact the site administrator.
errors.githubOauthNetworkError: Connection to GitHub login timed out. Please try again later. If this keeps happening, check your network, VPN, or proxy settings.
errors.githubOauthProviderError: GitHub login service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
errors.githubOauthTokenExchangeFailed: The GitHub authorization code is invalid or expired. Please start login again.
errors.githubOauthUserPayloadInvalid: GitHub returned incomplete user profile data. Please try again later.
errors.githubOauthCallbackFailed: GitHub login callback failed. Please sign in again.
errors.invalidCommentContent: The message content cannot be empty or too long.
errors.invalidFriendLinkName: The friend link name is invalid.
errors.invalidFriendLinkUrl: The friend link URL must be a valid http or https URL.
errors.invalidFriendLinkDesc: The friend link description is invalid.
errors.invalidImageBase64: The image upload failed or the image format is invalid.
errors.imageTooLarge: Image is too large. Please upload a file under 3MB.
errors.invalidFingerprint: The browser fingerprint is invalid. Refresh and try again.
